scripts.verify:consistency: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} node -e "(async () => { const { checkConsistency } = await import('./backupService.js'); console.log(JSON.stringify(await checkConsistency(), null, 2)); })()"
scripts.data:init: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} node -e "(async () => { const { initialize } = await import('./dataStore.js'); await initialize(); console.log('Data directory initialized'); })()"
scripts.data:snapshot:create: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} node -e "(async () => { const { createSnapshot } = await import('./backupService.js'); console.log(JSON.stringify(await createSnapshot(), null, 2)); })()"
scripts.data:snapshot:list: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} node -e "(async () => { const { listSnapshots } = await import('./backupService.js'); console.log(JSON.stringify(await listSnapshots(), null, 2)); })()"
scripts.data:snapshot:restore: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} node -e "(async () => { const { restoreFromSnapshot } = await import('./backupService.js'); const snapshotId = process.argv[1]; console.log(JSON.stringify(await restoreFromSnapshot(snapshotId), null, 2)); })()"
scripts.import:preview: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} node -e "(async () => { const { createPreview } = await import('./importPreview.js'); const { loadLegacyCompatibleDb } = await import('./dataStore.js'); const file = process.argv[1]; const fs = await import('node:fs/promises'); const data = JSON.parse(await fs.readFile(file, 'utf8')); const legacyDb = await loadLegacyCompatibleDb(); console.log(JSON.stringify(await createPreview(data.records || data, legacyDb.birds), null, 2)); })()"
scripts.import:commit: DATA_DIR=${DATA_DIR:-data} node -e "(async () => { const { commitImport } = await import('./importPreview.js'); const taskId = process.argv[1]; console.log(JSON.stringify(await commitImport(taskId), null, 2)); })()"
